theme: National Creative Ice Cream Flavors Day
haiku:
Scoops of colors bright,
Lemon zests and berry sweet,
Dreams melt in each bite.
Happy #NationalCreativeIceCreamFlavorsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Tickles dance like summer breeze,
Smiles bloom bright and wide.
Happy #InternationalJokeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden sunbeams shine,
Laughter fills the soft sweet air,
Cake and dreams align.
#HappyBirthdayGeorgeSand from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden film lights glow,
Stars twinkle in velvet night,
Sweet dreams take their flight.
#HappyBirthdayOliviadeHavilland from @ClamBakeSanta

Stars twinkle above,
Colors swirl in night’s embrace,
Dreams from afar gleam.
Happy #WorldUfoDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Anise dreams delight,
Warm sips of spice embrace you,
Cheerful hearts unite.
Happy #NationalAnisetteDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles softly glow,
Whispers of joy and dreams bloom,
A toast to the stars.
#HappyBirthdayHermannHesse from @ClamBakeSanta

Beans simmer and pop,
Spices whirl in warm embrace,
Taste buds dance with glee.
Happy #NationalEatBeansDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Glimmering to you,
Reflections glow with warm light,
Embrace all your grace.
Happy #ComplimentYourMirrorDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Books bloom like flowers,
Pages rustle, tales unfold,
Ink spills magic dreams.
#HappyBirthdayFranzKafka from @ClamBakeSanta

Skyward, colors bloom,
Children’s laughter fills the park,
Fireworks light the night.
Happy #IndependenceDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Smoky scents arise,
Tender ribs, glaze shining bright,
Gather 'round the grill.
Happy #NationalBarbecuedSpareribsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden leaves flutter,
A tale spun with warm delight,
Words like autumn's glow.
#HappyBirthdayNathanielHawthorne from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles glow like stars,
Melodies in warm embrace,
Joy wrapped in sweet song.
#HappyBirthdayStephenFoster from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden crusty treats,
Warm apples dance with spices,
Sweet joy on each bite.
Happy #NationalAppleTurnoverDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Books stacked high like hills,
Warm coffee brews, dreams take flight,
Rest on this sweet day.
Happy #WorkaholicsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles dance and glow,
Joyful songs and bright stories,
Magic fills the night.
#HappyBirthdayPTBarnum from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden crusts shimmer,
Savory scents fill the air,
Together we feast.
Happy #NationalFriedChickenDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sweet lips meet with warmth,
Petals dance in the soft breeze,
Hearts bloom with each kiss.
Happy #NationalKissingDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Vivid blooms surround,
Brush strokes dance in the moonlight,
Life's canvas alive.
#HappyBirthdayFridaKahlo from @ClamBakeSanta

Cakes stacked high with cream,
Laughter springs like fresh spring blooms,
Cheers dance in the air.
#HappyBirthdaySylvesterStallone from @ClamBakeSanta

Sweet cocoa whispers,
Velvet rivers of delight,
Joy wrapped in each bite.
Happy #WorldChocolateDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Cheesy rivers flow,
Twirl of pasta on forks bright,
Warm hugs on the plate.
Happy #NationalMacaroniDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colors dance on walls,
Joyful whispers fill the space,
Art sings through the years.
#HappyBirthdayMarcChagall from @ClamBakeSanta

Soft silver whispers,
Moonlight dances on still lakes,
Night wraps dreams in peace.
Happy #LastQuarterMoon from @ClamBakeSanta
